content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Solve Collaboration Issues with User Onboarding
content.seo_description: Learn how to implement professional user onboarding to overcome collaboration friction. An intermediate tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Collaboration friction stems from unguided user entry. By building a structured, automated onboarding flow, you synchronize client expectations with technical constraints. Using Antigravity to scaffold the logic and Claude Code to iterate on the UI, you can eliminate the 'can't collaborate' bottleneck and ship production-ready, self-service client portals in hours.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is confused, and your project repo has become a graveyard of 'I don't know how to access this' emails. The friction of onboarding is the single greatest killer of freelancer velocity. When you lack a formal entry point, you aren't just losing time—you're losing authority.

But what if you could automate the entire handshake? By shifting from manual hand-holding to a programmatic, intent-driven onboarding flow, you reclaim your autonomy. We’re going to leverage the speed of Antigravity and the reasoning engine of Claude Code to transform your chaotic collaboration process into a high-conversion, automated asset.

steps.title: Mapping the Collaboration Gap
steps.description: Identify the exact points where clients stall. We define the user schema and required permissions before writing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this user flow for a SaaS project: [Insert your flow]. Identify the three most common points of friction where a user fails to collaborate due to permission or context gaps. Suggest a schema update to handle automated onboarding.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Analyze codebase for current auth/onboarding bottlenecks and propose a schema migration'

steps.title: Scaffolding the Onboarding Logic
steps.description: Use Antigravity to generate the state machine for your onboarding process, ensuring users are guided through setup without blocking your time.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust state machine for a 5-step onboarding flow. Include transitions for 'pending', 'authorized', 'configured', and 'collaboration-ready'. Output in TypeScript.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add --file ./src/onboarding-machine.ts --content 'Implement the state machine logic generated by Antigravity'

steps.title: Building the Guided UI
steps.description: Iterate on the frontend components that translate technical requirements into plain-English setup steps.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React component for an onboarding progress stepper. It must handle async validation for each step and show clear error states for collaboration permissions.

steps.title: Automating Permission Propagation
steps.description: Ensure the onboarding logic automatically grants the correct collaboration scopes upon successful completion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure server-side handler that triggers a permission grant only after the onboarding state machine reaches 'configured'. Use standard RBAC patterns.

steps.title: Final Integration & Polish
steps.description: Tie the automated onboarding flow into your existing project architecture using Claude Code to ensure zero regression.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the integration between the onboarding machine and the main dashboard. Suggest any necessary middleware to prevent unauthorized access during the onboarding window.

pro_tips: Never build custom auth from scratch; use Antigravity to scaffold industry-standard OAuth2 flows, then let Claude Code handle the edge cases.
Treat your onboarding flow as a product, not a utility. A 5% increase in onboarding completion correlates to a 20% increase in client retention.
Use Claude Code's 'review' mode to perform a security audit on your onboarding routes before deployment—freelancers often overlook CORS issues during rapid prototyping.
Implement 'Ghost States' where the UI shows the collaborative features as 'locked' until the onboarding sequence is completed; this creates a psychological loop of progress.
Always log onboarding failures to a dedicated Slack channel; this provides real-time data on where your clients are struggling to collaborate.
content.next_steps: Deploy your onboarding flow to a staging environment, run a 'client-simulation' test, and then integrate it into your master branch.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on manual setup and start scaling your freelance business with automated, high-impact onboarding flows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
